name: Tengen
description: Atari Games' console label, known for NES releases including Pac-Man, Tetris, and other unlicensed cartridges.

eras.title: NES Label Era
eras.description: Atari Games' console publishing label, including licensed and unlicensed NES releases.

eras.title: Time Warner Transition
eras.description: Tengen branding ended as the division was renamed under Time Warner.

notes: Could be modeled as `sub` if you create `atari-games-company` as a parent containing this company.
